All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class controller.JBomberMan
main method that initializes the game and starts it
manageBombs() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to manage the bombs placed by the player, their counters and their explosion
manageExplosion(List<Integer>) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Handles the beginning of a new explosion for all the bombs that are detonating.
manageMonsters() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to manage the monsters' model-aspects
model - package model
 
ModelAssets - Class in model
This class contains useful arrays to keep track of the objects to manage.
monster - Variable in class model.ModelAssets
 
Monster - Class in model
Abstract class for the monsters and their general aspects
Monster(String, int, int) - Constructor for class model.Monster
Class constructor (it can be used by the subclasses)
MonsterView - Class in view
Class to manage the position of the monsters for the view package so that the package does not need to communicate with the model
MonsterView(String, int, int) - Constructor for class view.MonsterView
Class constructor
movePlayer() - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Method to notify the observer about the movement of the player
